MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lauren E. Powe, Esq. of BENNETT, SAMUELSEN, REYNOLDS & ALLARD (510-444-7688), appearing for defendant / moving party SLAKEY BROTHERS, INC.
Gibert L. Purcell, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Melvin Rodrick

RULING:
Defendant Slakey Brothers, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment. Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is denied. Plaintiff created a triable issue of fact by the Leslie declaration. Defendant's objections to the Leslie declaration are overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Lertora Aliventi, CSR # 11935

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant W. R. Meadows Inc.'s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied. Defendant failed to satisfy its burden of production as to the evidence-free prong because it did not present any responses to contention interrogatories and the deposition of plaintiff alone is insufficient to satisfy the burden on that prong. Defendant also failed to present facts negating that it manufactured, supplied or distributed any asbestos-containing product because Dwyer's declaration provides insufficient basis for such an assertion. Even if defendant satisfied its burden of production, plaintiff created a triable issue of fact by plaintiff's declaration and the references to Seal Tight in the manhole infiltration disk and seal assembly patent information. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Lertora Aliventi, CSR # 11935
